response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering abilities and a proven track record of shipping products, he falls critically short on the core technical requirements. The role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming; his resume shows only ~2 years (National Instruments brief stint, undergraduate thesis). Similarly, large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience (5 years minimum) is limited to one project at Dunnhumby and recent AWS CDK work at Tencent. The candidate lacks the depth in systems-level programming and infrastructure architecture essential for leading a cloud compute platform.
strengths: Consistent product delivery across multiple domains (iOS top 10 app, millions of mails shipped, real-time systems) showing pragmatic engineering sense
Demonstrates mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and team leadership across multiple companies
Full-stack technical versatility and ability to learn new domains quickly (C, C++, D, Java, Node, TypeScript, iOS, embedded systems)
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~2 years of C++ experience versus 8 years required as minimum qualification
Limited depth in large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems (Dunnhumby project details sparse; AWS CDK experience recent and narrow in scope)
No demonstrated technical leadership in cloud computing or DevOps contexts; mentoring experience is general software engineering, not infrastructure-focused

key_factors.factor: Product shipping and delivery track record
